name: The Message on the Window
summary: Condensation on a window forms a name. The name is the investigator's, and the investigator does not yet know it.
narrative_beats: A strip of condensation appears on the window beside you.
It is on the inside of the glass. No one is near it.
The wet draws itself into letters. The letters form a name.
Your chest tightens before your mind has read the name.
You exhale on the glass. Your own fog covers the letters.
When the fog clears, the window is dry and the name is gone.
consequences_if_passed: Investigator carries the shape of the name forward, even without the letters.
The Conductor will respond to the name in Carriage 2; one new gate opens.
consequences_if_failed: The investigator's own name in their head goes briefly soft.
On a 5+ SAN loss, INT check for temporary insanity; on a session loss of (1/5)·max_san or more, indefinite insanity check — catoptrophobia and onomatomania are the most thematically apt rolls.
